The FastAPI implementation in sre_agent_sandbox/server/app.py and integration tests in tests/test_server.py fully cover the required REST endpoints, WebSocket lifecycle/error behavior, 409 handling for step-before-reset, and per-session environment isolation.

summary: Pass. The feature implementation matches the mission description and expected behavior with no high-confidence actionable defects identified from the reviewed evidence.
